'''''Star Wars''''' is the first of two ''Star Wars'' [[Marvel Illustrated Books]] reprinting stories first printed in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|UK weekly ''Star Wars'']] comic. This edition reprinted and colorized three full stories from the UK comic. It also reprints the [[Pursuit!|concluding part]] of ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]'', the beginning of which was printed in ''[[Pizzazz]]'' #10–16 before the magazine was discontinued.

The four stories are:
*''[[Way of the Wookiee!]]''
*''[[The Day after the Death Star!]]''
*''[[The Weapons Master!]]''
*[[Pursuit!|''War on Ice!'']]
